case_title: FAST CASH INC VS SARTWELL, GLORIA F.C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $315.00 FILED BY FAST CASH INC AS TO DEFENDANT SARTWELL, GLORIA F.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SARTWELL, GLORIA F.C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAST CASH INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARTWELL, GLORIA F.C. $315.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $385.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT FILED; HEARING W A S ON 4-2-99;
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $9.39 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SARTWELL, GLORIA F.C.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SARTWELL, GLORIA F.C.
